name: flow-07-friend-request-processor
description: T73 FriendRequestProcessor — ROUTING archetype. Inline T81 privacy check → SETNX idempotency → storeDocument → FriendRequestSent emit.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: privacy_gate_before_emit, store_before_enqueue, connection_id_direction_independent
Retrieve ROUTING arch patterns for T73: inline privacy gate, SETNX idempotency, connection ID direction independence
Break T73 into: inline T81 check → SETNX idempotency on requestId → mutual-pending auto-forward detection → storeDocument → FriendRequestSent emit
Generate friend-request.service.ts: inject PrivacyGatekeeper (T81), call check() synchronously first, SETNX on requestId, storeDocument('xiigen-friend-requests') BEFORE enqueue('FriendRequestSent')
Named check validation: privacy_gate_before_emit, store_before_enqueue, connection_id_direction_independent
Score generated code 0-100 against T73 iron rules: T81 inline before emit, SETNX idempotency, DNA-8 ordering
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=inline T81 check (synchronous, constructor-injected), rejected=queue-driven privacy check (emit privacy.check.requested). curriculumTier=1.
